title: Structured First Operating Updates Parent Closeout
goal: Close parent issue #530 after its concrete child issues and dogfooded follow-through satisfy the structured-first operating update lane.
non_goals: Do not add new behavior in the parent closeout.
Do not reopen completed child lanes without a fresh regression or acceptance gap.

intent.outcome: Common operating updates now prefer structured fields, constrained templates, generated prose, writer helpers, and validation-friction routing over repeated hand-written narrative.
intent.constraints: Use checked-in child evidence and compact package reports; keep the parent closeout as evidence, not a new first-line surface.
intent.latitude: Planning-state closeout, external issue closure, and proof of planning-surface health.
intent.escalation: Create a new narrow issue only if the parent acceptance criteria reveal an unsatisfied concrete behavior.

execution.next_step: Close #530 after refreshed external evidence confirms no child issue remains open.
execution.proof: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json

invariants: Parent closure must be reconstructable from child issue closeouts and archived plans.
No generated prose or review artifact should become a hidden state store.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Reduce how much prose agents must write to operate the package correctly.
intent_continuity.continuation surface: fresh issues only when recurring prose-authoring burden cannot use existing structured-first mechanisms

required_continuation.activation trigger: new repeated prose-authoring burden that cannot be represented by existing fields, templates, generated prose, writer helpers, or validation-friction routing

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: The structured-first parent lane can leave active backlog after its child evidence landed.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: No specific child issue remains open.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Parent closeout was mostly planning bookkeeping; the package summary and external evidence made this cheap enough without adding a new feature.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Continue until the backlog is empty and close issues as completed.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Close the remaining parent issue only after confirming child work and acceptance coverage.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Mark the parent lane done in planning state and close #530 with references to its completed children.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Verify #530 children are closed and the lane acceptance maps to shipped/residue surfaces.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml and this archived parent closeout record
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any runtime, contract, docs, or test behavior change

stop_conditions.stop when: An open child issue or unsatisfied acceptance criterion appears.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: Parent closure would need new behavior.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Files outside planning closeout need changes.

context_budget.live working set: Issue #530, child issue states, compact summary, closeout-trust report, workflow obligations report, and planning state.
context_budget.recoverable later: Child archived execplans and GitHub issue history.
context_budget.do not bulk read: Historical reviews unless a compact report points there.

delegated_judgment.reason: The remaining work is parent-lane evidence reconciliation and planning-state closeout.

invariants: Structured state remains authoritative; generated prose remains adapter/output.
Parent closeout should not introduce a new live surface.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Fresh recurring prose-authoring burden should be routed through existing structured-first mechanisms before adding features.
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Planning state marks the parent lane closed.

execution_run.summary: Refreshed external evidence, confirmed #530 is the only open issue and its named children are closed, then converted the parent lane from deferred to done.

finished_run_review.findings: No additional implementation work was required for #530 after #525.

proof_report.commands: Run selected planning proof and doctor after writing this record.

system_intent_alignment.reason: The closeout removes active backlog residue without adding a new operating surface.

generated_closeout.summary: #530 is satisfied by the completed structured-first child lane sequence: inventory, generated closeout prose, compressed inventory residue, constrained templates, structured Memory metadata, writer helpers, validation-friction routing, and correct-by-design review criteria.
generated_closeout.validation: Planning summary and doctor should remain healthy after this state change.
generated_closeout.residue: Closed child execplans and promoted shipped surfaces carry durable evidence.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Do parent-lane closure from structured child evidence instead of re-summarizing implementation prose by hand.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Keep structured-first operating updates closed unless new repeated prose-authoring burden cannot use existing mechanisms.
durable_residue.promotion trigger: fresh recurring prose-authoring burden that existing structured fields, templates, generated prose, writer helpers, or validation-friction routing cannot handle

execution_summary.changed: Planning state and archived parent closeout record only.

signals found: Parent closeout was cheap using existing summary and external evidence surfaces.
signals fixed: No new product issue needed; existing structured-first mechanisms cover the remaining burden.
signals dismissed: A dedicated parent-closeout feature would overfit this repo and duplicate existing summary/evidence flows.

discard.item: Implementation detail recap for every child issue
discard.reason: Recoverable from child archived plans and commits.

proof_expectations: Planning state projects no open structured-first lane after #530 closes.
External evidence refresh should show zero open issues after closure.

anti_overfitting_review.reason: The change records generic lane closure evidence without adding model-, repo-, host-, or tracker-specific shipped behavior.

cost_assessment.quality: Parent closure is evidence-backed and reconstructable.
cost_assessment.efficiency: Compact summary and external evidence avoided broad rereads.
cost_assessment.cognitive_load: Low; the package pointed directly at the remaining parent lane.
cost_assessment.correct_by_design_assessment: Existing structured fields were enough; no validation repair loop occurred.
